cells.answer: I am responsible for making hiring decisions and managing recruitment for my team or department
I assist with recruitment by coordinating interviews, evaluating candidates, or onboarding new hires

questions.question_prompt: Q3: To what degree do you agree with the following statements on how AI will impact your company’s hiring process in the new year?
panels: Q3: AI hiring tools will help diversity efforts by reducing bias
Q3: AI will create new challenges in assessing candidates’ authenticity
Q3: AI will help identify better-quality candidates
Q3: AI will make recruitment faster and more efficient
Q3: I am concerned about candidates using AI tools in their applications.
Q3: I don’t think AI will have a significant impact

questions.question_prompt: Q16: Would you be willing to hire a foreign worker if they are more qualified than a US national?
panels: Q16: Would you be willing to hire a foreign worker if they are more qualified than a US national?
answers: Yes, I would be willing, regardless of visa requirements.
Yes, as long as they will never require require visa sponsorship
Yes, as long as they don’t currently require visa sponsorship (but may in the future).
Yes, as long as they have previously worked or studied in the U.S. (but need sponsorship)
